title: clematis kirilowii var. latisepala
intro: Clematis kirilowii var. latisepala, also known as Clematis tangutica, is a type of flowering vine native to the mountainous regions of China. It is a plant species that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis kirilowii var. latisepala include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and certain types of infections, as well as its potential to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Clematis kirilowii var. latisepala typically involve drying the plant's roots and stems, then using them to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
